title: Brand Compliance Configuration
description: Brand-level compliance configuration that lives in brand.json. The policy team selects registry policies and adds custom rules. The buying team never interacts with this configuration — they create campaign plans that reference the brand, and governance agents resolve applicable policies automatically.

registry_policies.description: References to standardized policies in the policy registry. Each reference identifies a policy by ID and may include configuration parameters.

custom_policies.description: Brand-specific rules as natural language strings. Evaluated by governance agents using AI interpretation. The registry is preferred; custom policies exist for brand-specific rules that do not yet have standardized equivalents.

verticals.description: The brand's industry verticals (e.g., "cpg", "beverage", "pharmaceutical"). Governance agents use this to match vertical-specific registry policies.
